title: Summarize Technical Documentation
scenario: Provide a technical summary of a given Python function (50-100 lines of code). The summary should include a brief description of what the function does, the input parameters, return values, and any notable exceptions. Assume the reader has basic knowledge of Python programming. The summary should be in the format of a docstring and must not exceed 100 words.
constraints: Must be in the format of a docstring

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the generated summary is in the format of a docstring and does not exceed 100 words.
Verify the accuracy of the technical summary, including function description, input parameters, return values, and exceptions.
Evaluate the clarity of the summary, ensuring it is easy to understand for a reader with basic knowledge of Python programming.
Assess the readability of the summary, considering factors such as grammar, spelling, and formatting.
